prompt: Help me perform a comprehensive business-logic security assessment for a mobile banking app. The app includes transfers, top-ups, withdrawals, wealth-product purchases, password reset, real-name verification, and related features. Output a complete security test report template that I can use directly.

assertions.text: Includes at least 3 concrete real WooYun case references (company name + vulnerability description)
Includes quantitative statistics (case count or high-risk percentage)
Covers all 6 domains (authentication, authorization, financial, information disclosure, logic flow, configuration)
Eachbanklinesfunction can(Transfer/Top-Up/Withdrawal/manage finance/Password Reset/Real-Name Verification)all has forshouldofTest Item
Output format is a directly usable report template(include includeSeverity/impact response assess assess/Reproduction Stepsetc.Field)
Includes architecture-level and code-level defense recommendations
